raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Newsom is pushing for 100 percent zero emission energy.",
    "Many have admitted that the energy and climate goals proposed are completely unattainable and unrealistic.",
    "Governor Newsom's budget bill streamlined more natural gas plants to maintain energy supply.",
    "The Public Utilities Commission is considering a proposal that will disincentivize and tax solar projects.",
    "Smarter climate policy involves greater investments in forestry management to reduce emissions from wildfires.",
    "Carbon capture technology can help meet emissions reduction targets without significantly increasing consumer costs."
  ]
}
```
